formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative equals Total operating expenses

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes - Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities
Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Purchases of investments in non-affiliated entities + Proceeds from sales of investments in non-affiliated entities + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities plus Net cash used in investing activities plus Net cash used in financing activities equals Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
components: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period + Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Restricted cash equals Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
components: Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents (reconciliation) + Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets

corrected_cfo_components.label: Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net

items_corrected: Gains on investments in non-affiliated entities and publicly-held equity securities, net: sign corrected from +264 to -264 (gain is subtracted as non-cash item)
Other: sign corrected from +288 to -288 (shown in parentheses in filing indicating cash reduction)
Accounts receivable: sign corrected from +4133 to -4133 (increase in receivables uses cash)
Inventories: sign corrected from +1380 to -1380 (increase in inventories uses cash)
Prepaid expenses and other assets: sign corrected from +12 to -12 (increase in prepaid assets uses cash)

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Investing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in investing activities
Financing inflows minus outflows equals Net cash used in financing activities
Net cash provided by operating activities plus Net cash used in investing activities plus Net cash used in financing activities equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
Cash and cash equivalents plus Restricted cash equals Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
